c.d: The total number of active users or downloads, indicating the app's popularity and potential audience reach.
c.s: Bigo Live, Twitch, YouTube Live, Facebook Live, Play Store Data

c.d: Supported operating systems and devices, such as Android, iOS, desktop, or browser-based access.
Availability of in-app purchases, virtual gifting, subscriptions, or other revenue options for creators.
Support for multi-camera feeds, real-time editing, HD video quality, and customized branding.
Tools like live chat, multi-guest streaming, live polls, or audio rooms to enhance engagement.
Whether the app is free, freemium, or paid, including any subscription costs or additional purchases.
How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface and setup are for live streaming.
Ability to stream simultaneously to multiple platforms or destinations.
